## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Area

- [ ] Firmware
- [ ] Mixxx mapping
- [ ] Rekordbox reference

## Checks

- [ ] I kept the change focused.
- [ ] I updated README/docs where behavior, wiring, or build steps changed.
- [ ] I did not include generated caches, backup zips, build output, or `.DS_Store` files.
- [ ] I understand contributions are licensed under the applicable project license in `LICENSE.md`.

## Testing

Describe what you tested. Include `pio run`, Mixxx/Rekordbox version, KiCad ERC/DRC, or print/build notes when relevant.
